Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Olissa Agnos]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Olissa is one of Lycus and Andra's parents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Olissa wrapped Simon's wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Olissa is a woman who checks on Simon in the wagon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Olissa is a person who found a spear and was in the wagon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Olissa and Lycus helped carry Caius into Valinhall.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Olissa stated that without the magical healing of the Valinhall pool, Simon would have been a crippled wreck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Olissa Agnos has honey-brown hair that she cut short.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Olissa Agnos wears copper goggles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Olissa uses long-handled tongs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Olissa Agnos is a woman who wears goggles and work gloves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Olissa is part of the Agnos family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Olissa is a tinkerer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Olissa is a woman who works in the workshop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Olissa was standing by the door.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — Olissa Agnos is a person mentioned by the Eldest Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Olissa ordered Simon to use the pool.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Olissa is working on new versions of Simon's mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Olissa Agnos is the wife of Caius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Olissa explained that a power needs a room to contain it so different powers do not mix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Olissa was present in Simon's bedroom.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
